tagline: Reach your goals with the support you deserve.
seoDescription: Elevate Fitness is a private personal training studio in Santa Rosa, CA, led by founder Josh Mesa. Specializing in Neurokinetic Therapy (NKT), corrective exercise, personal training, group fitness, yoga therapy, and nutrition coaching for clients across Sonoma County.
heroSubheading: We're here to support you no matter where you are in your fitness journey. Personalized training, Neurokinetic Therapy, and nutrition coaching in Santa Rosa.
highlights: Founded by Josh Mesa, Certified Personal Trainer with 11+ years of experience
Level 3 Neurokinetic Therapist (NKT) and Corrective Exercise Specialist
Private, one-on-one training studio - no cookie-cutter programs
Integrates resistance training, cardio, mobility, and nutrition
Pain management and injury rehabilitation through NKT
5.0-star Google rating from Sonoma County clients
aboutBody: Elevate Fitness is a private personal training studio in Santa Rosa serving clients throughout Sonoma County. Founded around 2016 by Josh Mesa, the studio set out to redefine personal training by replacing cookie-cutter programs with a truly customized fitness experience. As Josh puts it, "Your body is your vessel to achieve the life of your dreams" - and his mission is to build a custom solution that fits each individual client.

Josh brings more than 11 years of expertise to every session. He is a Certified Personal Trainer, Corrective Exercise Specialist, Performance Enhancement specialist, and a Level 3 Neurokinetic Therapist. That blend of credentials lets Elevate Fitness go beyond traditional workouts to address the root causes of pain and dysfunction, correct muscular imbalances, and help clients break through plateaus they couldn't solve on their own.

Training at Elevate integrates five key components of fitness: resistance training, cardio, mobility, nutrition, and expert instruction. Whether you're rehabilitating an injury, training as a competitive athlete, or simply trying to move and feel better, the studio offers a supportive, personalized environment designed to help you reach your goals and unleash your full potential.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one training that integrates resistance training, cardio, mobility, and nutrition guidance, with tailored solutions built around your goals.

services.title: Neurokinetic Therapy (NKT)
services.description: A corrective approach that targets the relationship between the nervous system and muscular imbalances to identify the source of pain, correct dysfunction, and support comprehensive rehabilitation.

services.title: NKT for Athletes
services.description: Specialized work to correct muscle imbalances, enhance neuromuscular efficiency, and prevent injury so athletes can elevate performance.

services.title: Group Fitness Training
services.description: Dynamic workouts in a supportive group environment that harness the power of community to keep you motivated.

services.title: Yoga Therapy
services.description: Sessions for mind, body, and spirit that create harmony between mind and body, enhance balance and connectivity, and reduce stress.

services.title: Nutrition Coaching
services.description: One-on-one Zoom consultations, group classes, and recorded content covering macros, choosing the best diet for your body, and strategies to support your goals.

testimonials.quote: Many thanks to Elevate Fitness. I had reached a major plateau and couldn't figure out what was next.
testimonials.author: Scott M.

testimonials.quote: I've been working with Josh since 2012. I've got a congenital back problem and he's helped me keep my active lifestyle.
testimonials.author: Vince R.

testimonials.quote: I am a track sprinter and high jumper, and I've been working with Elevate Fitness since my senior year of high school.
testimonials.author: Worthy B.

notes:
CONFIRMED - This is the correct business. Phone (707) 332-6760 and address 3451 Airway Dr Suite M, Santa Rosa, CA 95403 cross-match across the official site (weelevatefitness.com), Facebook, Nextdoor, and gym directories. Owner/founder is Josh (Joshua) Mesa, also listed in the NKT (Neurokinetic Therapy) practitioner directory.

SOURCES:
- Official site: https://weelevatefitness.com/ , /about/ , /services/ , /contact/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/weelevatefitness/
- Nextdoor: https://nextdoor.com/pages/elevate-fitness-santa-rosa-ca-1/
- Yelp listing exists: https://www.yelp.com/biz/elevate-fitness-santa-rosa (review content not verified)
- NKT Directory (Joshua Mesa): https://nktdirectory.com/listings/joshua-mesa/
- UpGyms: https://www.upgyms.com/1298/elevate-fitness (shows 0 reviews there)

CAVEATS / UNVERIFIED:
- FOUNDING YEAR: Inferred. The about page says \"Seven years ago, we embarked on a journey to redefine personal training.\" Page assets are dated 2023, so ~2016 is a reasonable estimate for the studio's founding. Marked 'Est. 2016' but this is an inference, not a stated year. A search snippet also stated Josh \"began his career as a full-time personal trainer in 2009\" and was motivated after seeing family/friends struggle with diabetes/heart attacks/cancer/arthritis - this DID NOT surface in my direct page fetches, so I treated it cautiously and did NOT assert the diabetes origin story or 2009 date as fact in the copy (only the studio-founding framing). The Vince R. testimonial ('working with Josh since 2012') independently supports a long pre-2016 training career.
- RATING: 5.0 stars / 3 reviews reported via search aggregators citing Google. Not independently opened/verified on Google Maps. Low review count - use with the understanding the sample is small. UpGyms shows 0 reviews.
- TESTIMONIALS: Quotes are from the studio's own about page. Scott M.'s quote appears truncated on the page (it cuts off mid-thought); I used it as shown. These are real client quotes from the site but are self-published testimonials, not third-party verified reviews.
- HOURS: NOT FOUND on any source. Left empty rather than guessing. By-appointment private studio model strongly implied.
- INSTAGRAM/GOOGLE social URLs: not confirmed, left empty. Facebook confirmed.
- PHOTOS: The two URLs are real images hosted on the studio's own WordPress media library (filenames reference Elevate Fitness / Sonoma County / NKT). I did not visually open them to confirm subject matter, but the filenames and source domain indicate they belong to this business. The logo PNG was excluded per instructions (no logos).
- PRICE RANGE: Not published; left empty.
